hi first repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer 1 do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2 the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence only use unique words in your response no word should be repeated all sentences must be connected using hyphens with no spaces between them there should be 2 paragraphs paragraphs and only paragraphs are separated with each other by two line breaks

the task involves solving a mathematical problem where a sequence of prime numbers is generated based on a specific rule the sequence starts with a 5-digit prime number and each subsequent number is the smallest prime number greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number the sequence continues until the 19th year from age 13 to 19 the sequence must be generated for 7 years ages 13 to 19

module 1 identify the initial 5-digit prime number the initial prime number is 12347 module 2 calculate the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number the sum of the squares of the digits of 12347 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 7² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 49 = 79 module 3 generate the sequence of primes for each year from 13 to 19 the prime number at age 14 is 83 at age 15 is 107 at age 16 is 131 at age 17 is 149 at age 18 is 167 and at age 19 is 179 module 4 validate that each prime adheres to the rule each prime is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number player
